sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60641" key="kuklomo/lubdos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυκλο-μόλυβδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60641.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">round lead-pencil,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.63</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Damoch.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
